title: Clean Concrete
body:
Makes all concrete blocks clean, with no other features on the textures.

Ignore "made for a newer version of Minecraft" warning, this resource pack should work on the latest version of Minecraft to 1.12.

Screenshot:
![Concrete Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3695f1f86bac62eed0d3ef463fe18945dd36ed90.png)
